evidence: A great series covering the 2nd war.
I can easily overlook their shortcomings.
I guess I am happy with the series because it is about something I love.
I do have trouble hearing many of the short remarks at times - usually when it's important!
I can see now, after reading many other's reviews, the shortcomings of this drama.
I know the series is not historically accurate, but so far at least they haven't just 'STOOPID SLAPPED' us.
I was honored to be there when the Explorer's Club awarded him their 'LIFETIME ACHIEVEMENT MEDAL!'
I also HEAVILY recommend 'In Search Of Human Origins' w/ Don Johansen.
I LOVE HAVING NEW INTELLIGENT INFORMATION LAID OUT LIKE THIS SHOW DOES.
This is not only Don Johanson's personal story of how he found 'Lucy,' but also OUR story.
This history is not to be forgotten!,...EVER!
I started reading all I could and recording any shows on our human story.

summary: The user shows a strong preference for historical and dramatic content, often valuing informative and educational narratives. They appreciate slower pacing and emotional resonance, indicating a desire for depth and meaning in their viewing experiences.
